ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: R. Edwards/E. Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Brian S. Healy, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bhupinder Rai, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Kim Qana, Husam Qana & Lakeside Liquors, Inc. as follows:
Principal $143,739.22
Interest $5,706.25
Attorney's Fees $14,373.92
Costs $439.50 for a total of $164,258.89
Judgment signed in open court.
